narrative:
Hartsgrove Twp township has 948 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
